sys_ws_operation.name: GET Policy

sys_update_version.name: sys_ws_operation_24f310091dcf3a1062a3fd68f681ce59
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl/><http_method>GET</http_method><name>GET Policy</name><operation_script><![CDATA[/**
 * ServiceNow Scripted REST API Resource Script
 *
 * SETUP INSTRUCTIONS:
 * 1. Navigate to: System Web Services > Scripted REST APIs
 * 2. Click "New" to create a new API
 *    - Name: Insurance Policy Servicing API
 *    - API ID: insurance_policy
 *    - Base API Path: /api/x_insurance/policy_servicing
 *
 * 3. After creating the API, create a new Resource:
 *    - HTTP Method: GET
 *    - Name: Get App
 *    - Relative Path: /
 *    - Copy the script below into the Script field
 *
 * 4. Submit and activate the REST API
 *
 * ACCESS:
 * https://[your-instance].service-now.com/api/x_insurance/policy_servicing/
 */

(function process(request, response) {
  // Retrieve the React app HTML from system property
  var html = gs.getProperty('x_insurance.policy_servicing_app');

  // If property doesn't exist or is empty, return error
  if (!html) {
    response.setStatus(500);
    response.setBody({
      error: 'Application not configured',
      message: 'System property x_insurance.policy_servicing_app is not set'
    });
    return;
  }

  // Set response headers
  response.setContentType('text/html');
  response.setStatus(200);

  // Write HTML to response
  response.getStreamWriter().writeString(html);

})(request, response);
]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_dxcis_smart_st_0/insurance_policy</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>stephanie.lyons</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-12 00:12:35</sys_created_on><sys_id>24f310091dcf3a1062a3fd68f681ce59</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>GET Policy</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Smart Studio Workspace" source="x_dxcis_smart_st_0">3c24ed4a783ab290b4196c8fb1ecad43</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Smart Studio Workspace">3c24ed4a783ab290b4196c8fb1ecad43</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_24f310091dcf3a1062a3fd68f681ce59</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>stephanie.lyons</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-12 00:12:35</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Insurance Policy Servicing API">3dc3d8c51dcf3a1062a3fd68f681ce4f</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>
